name: The Sonnellinos / Gangbang
description:
⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Sixsome with the Sonnellinos

At least the top men of Don, and Don himself

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Pic taken by me in Catalog Avatar Creator, i had no clue how to put this in an environment GET BLUE'D

To reiterate, Soldier is Borys Aslanov, Consigliere is Claude Moreau, Contractee is Gunther Haas, Caporegime is Ezio Ambrogetti, and Mafioso is Don Sonnellino, all of them except for Don are headcanon names and are done because,,, idk codenames dummy BUT I GET IT AS FAR AS REALISM. No made man wants their actual name attached to the mafia.

Completely unrelated but my Consigliere design makes him look like a magician, but I'll project onto him and say that he wanted so bad to be a magician but he was probably bullied out of that

As well as this is going to be a multiple character bot, characters may feel flat and condensed but this is purely smut!

Small detail but Consigliere and Caporegime are Don's higher ranked men (signalled by that handkerchief, as well as white roses/flowers being a symbol of the Sonnellinos) (They all do have white flower pins, except for don, maybe it's under his trench coat)

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Thank you to Anon for requesting!

"Can you do a gangbang with all of the goons and don.. where soldier specifically is fucking them in the intro and finds their g spot"

Yes! It seems like this would be more consensual if I'm not mistaken. Also the comment about soldier made me think about making him sleazy in a way but I want to be careful with him to avoid some Russian character stigmas about being "hard and tough" but that's a completely different thought.

Request here!

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

!!Warning for ALL my bots I DID encode a piss kink into them but that's completely optional!!

YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧
